mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN indent_state =1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) waitReceiving, COUNT(CASE WHEN (indent_state = 2 or indent_state =3 or indent_state = 4 or indent_state = 5) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) inServiceing, COUNT(CASE WHEN indent_state = 6 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) toEvaluate FROM app_substitute_driving_indent WHERE user_id =55
SELECT id from app_substitute_driving_indent WHERE pay_state <> 1 AND indent_state <> 4 AND user_id = #{userid}
